summary: A music-driven, stylized montage of masked ICE/ERO agents escorting handcuffed and chained detainees through an office corridor, with on-screen overlays naming an individual ('YONEL LEON HERNANDEZ') and his immigration charges, climaxing in a slow-motion hero close-up of an armored ERO agent with binoculars. The messaging pairs perp-walk humiliation with a tough, cinematic 'we are coming for you' tone, reinforced by the tweet's self-deport call to action. It fits youth-appeal produced content because of the spectacle styling, kinetic editing, named-target overlays, and slow-mo agent glamor shot rather than plain documentation.

script.scene: A masked ICE agent escorts a handcuffed young man (wearing a Michael Kors sweatshirt) down a beige office hallway toward camera; another detainee follows behind.
Close on the chained detainee; red box overlay names 'YONEL LEON HERNANDEZ' and lists 'CUSTODY REDETERMINATION/ FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH ALTERNATIVES TO DETENTION REQUIREMENTS.'
A masked, N95-wearing detainee in a green jacket walks forward down a bright white corridor, hands cuffed at the waist with a belly chain visible.
A black-balaclava ICE agent grips the arm of a green-hooded detainee, moving him through a doorway.
Stylized slow-motion hero shot: an armored ERO agent (yellow 'ERO' on vest) raises binoculars to his face in sunlight, framed through a vehicle window.

notable_text: CUSTODY REDETERMINATION/ FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH ALTERNATIVES TO DETENTION REQUIREMENTS
If you're in the United States and you are illegally present, spare yourself the hassle and self-deport.
